title: Push Everything Away
body:
In this mod, you will find that you have a new power - **push all blocks away**!

**Ground hammer**: There are several ground hammers of different materials in this mod. Different materials correspond to different properties. You can use them to hit any block and watch them fly out!

**Range push**: Just press and hold the right button to charge up, and you can knock away all the blocks within a certain range, up to thousands of blocks. See what kind of spectacular scene you can create!

Whether you want to clear a patch of land or just see how far you can send blocks flying, this mod will be ideal for you.
